title: Indie Semiconductor Closing in on Profitability
text: indie Semiconductor is moving closer to profitability while experiencing significant backlog expansion. Strategic backlog reached $7.4 billion, demonstrating robust design-win momentum. Q3 2025: $53.7 million revenue, non-GAAP gross margin 49.6%. Operating losses narrowing to $11.3 million (down from $16.8 million YoY). With backlog at $7.4 billion, the company remains on track to become profitable. Successfully designed robotaxi for North American autonomous vehicle manufacturer. Launched quantum computing laser products with reduced frequency noise. Analyst ratings: Benchmark Co maintained Buy with $8 target. UBS resumed coverage with Neutral stance and $5 target, citing cautious near-term guidance despite stable market conditions.
